name: Purchasing
description: Customer wants to buy, order, or sign up for a Virgin Media product or service — including broadband, TV, phone, or specific packages. They may be a new customer looking to join or an existing customer enquiring about purchasing additional products. This is not about upgrading or changing an existing service.
